paragraphs: JHYPCB is a reliable PCB manufacturer in China and offers rapid PCB prototype service for quick-turn PCB fabrication at high quality and low cost. We can prototype your PCB within 3-7 days.

JHYPCB offers full feature PCB manufacturing services with high reliability to be compatible with your requirement. PCB fabrication services include rigid FR4 PCB, Flexible PCB, Rigid-flex PCB, HDI PCB, High-Frequency PCB, Rogers PCB, Multilayer PCB, Heavy Copper PCB, etc.
Full turnkey PCB assembly services in China. JHYPCB specializes in prototype PCB assembly, quick turn PCB assembly, and low-to-high volume PCB assembly services with production capabilities.

We are a leading PCB manufacturing & PCB assembly manufacturer and supplier in China. We have over ten years of experience in custom PCB fabrication and assembly with advanced PCB technology, high-quality standards & RoHS compliance.

A full-service electronic manufacturing company headquartered in China specializes in printed circuit board manufacturing and assembly services. We will provide a full range of technical support and services for the smooth progress of your project.

Home Services Projects Professional LED PCB Manufacturing & Assembly Services Aluminum, Copper & Flexible LED Circuit Boards with Superior Heat Dissipation ISO 9001 Certified | Fast Turnaround | Competitive Pricing

JHYPCB specializes in high-quality LED PCB manufacturing and assembly services, delivering complete solutions from design to delivery. With advanced aluminum and copper core materials and precision manufacturing processes, we ensure superior heat dissipation and product reliability for automotive, lighting, medical, and consumer electronics industries.
From prototype to production, we provide complete LED PCB manufacturing and assembly solutions tailored to your specific requirements.
Cost-effective aluminum substrate LED PCBs with excellent heat dissipation performance. Ideal for general LED lighting applications and automotive lighting solutions.
Applications: LED street lights, automotive lamps, commercial lighting, home lighting
High-performance copper substrate for demanding high-power LED applications. Delivers maximum thermal conductivity for superior LED performance and longevity.
Applications: High-power LED headlights, industrial lighting, stage lighting, medical lighting
